name: Chicken Breast Casserole
recipeIngredient: 6 boned and skinned chicken breasts (may use 4-6)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs and milk together and let the chicken marinate in this mixture, refrigerated for 30 minutes.
2. Roll each chicken breast in bread crumbs mixed with parmesan cheese and seasonings (salt, pepper, garlic salt).
3. Fry the breaded chicken breasts in butter until they are light golden brown on all sides.
4. Butter a casserole dish on the bottom and sides.
5. Layer the fried chicken breasts, mushrooms, mozzarella cheese, and grated parmesan cheese in the dish. Repeat layers until the dish is full, placing smaller pieces at the bottom (usually about 2 layers).
6. Bake uncovered at 325°F for 25-35 minutes.
Note: This dish can be prepared ahead of time, refrigerated overnight, and baked when ready to serve.
